system.Text:
When you **encounter a manifestation of the darkness within you and try to resist its pull**, roll +heart and change any challenge die below your darkness level to your darkness level.

On a **strong hit**, you stave off the darkness and affirm your control over it. Take +1 momentum.

On a **weak hit**, you stave off the darkness for now but still feel its grip on you. You press on.

On a **miss**, the darkness nearly overwhelms you. Mark darkness, and choose one:
* Wield the Darkness to Act (not Interrupt or Empower) and add +1.
* Indulge the Darkness: You act against your better nature to your detriment.
* @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.c10d64f58dd8c5bf]{Pay the Price}

You may not Wield the Darkness to Interrupt this move.

Trigger.Text: When you encounter a manifestation of the darkness within you and try to resist its pull
